title: Magic Season Decorative Glass Bottles with Cork Stopper (9 fl oz. Potion Bottles / 2 Pcs)
description:
About this item
Glass and Cork Stoppers
Eye-Catching Design: These transparent glass bottles feature a classic potion bottle style with a vintage-inspired cylindrical shape and flared opening.
Versatile Decor: Display filled with potpourri, dried flowers, or other natural items, or leave them empty on a shelf. The bottles can also hold potpourri, bath salts, or other small items.
Convenient Pair: Includes two matching bottles, each with a synthetic cork stopper for an airtight seal to keep contents fresh.
Decorative Display: Standing at 10.5 cm or 4.1 inches tall with a maximum diameter of 9 cm or 3.5 inches, each bottle makes a charming decorative accessory.
Generous Capacity: At 260 ml or 9 fluid ounces each, the bottles provide ample room to showcase your creative displays or gifts.
Durable Glass Construction: Made of transparent glass, the bottles have a timeless look that will complement any decor for years to come. The synthetic cork stoppers ensure long-lasting use.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: Great little bottles for decorations, or to use as diffusers!Nice giftsWorked well. The glass feels thick and well made. The cork fits and stays well.Just the right size. We added stoppers into the cork and they are GREAT!These were a great addition to our medieval birthday team. We used him to put potions lol. Their drinks in my kids still drink out of them every day! Great quality.These work great for potions and/or moon water!!My son wanted these to look like magic potion bottles, and with a little food coloring and water they do! He loves them! They're well made so I'm sure they would be great for whatever you wanted to put in them as well.I bought these w some potion labels to make Halloween decorations, they are perfect for that or any other craft project you have in mind.Got to make potions with friend’s daughter. Worked greatSmall and sturdy
reviews_1s: These are so small and a waste of money. Maybe the size of my fist at the most. Go to the dollar store and get much larger and same quality for a dollar. You won’t be able to do anything with these.
